Manipulation/offset.name: offset
Manipulation/offset.description: Get the current coordinates of the first element, or set the coordinates of every element, in the set of matched elements, relative to the document.

info.excerpt: Get the current coordinates of the first element, or set the coordinates of every element, in the set of matched elements, relative to the document.

Manipulation/outerHeight.name: outerHeight
Manipulation/outerHeight.description: Get the current computed outer height (including padding, border, and optionally margin) for the first element in the set of matched elements or set the outer height of every matched element.

info.excerpt: Get the current computed outer height (including padding, border, and optionally margin) for the first element in the set of matched elements or set the outer height of every matched element.

Manipulation/outerWidth.name: outerWidth
Manipulation/outerWidth.description: Get the current computed outer width (including padding, border, and optionally margin) for the first element in the set of matched elements or set the outer width of every matched element.

info.excerpt: Get the current computed outer width (including padding, border, and optionally margin) for the first element in the set of matched elements or set the outer width of every matched element.
